rows.label: tlk43320242_02_msg0001
rows.name:
A new leader, then.
Let us review the basics
of battle.

rows.label: tlk43320242_02_msg0002
rows.name:
If you're attacked with your
weapon sheathed, you'll take
a lot of damage.

rows.label: tlk43320242_02_msg0003
rows.name:
If you're not battle-ready,
you won't even be guarding.

rows.label: tlk43320242_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Then you want to watch out
for the ugly mugs out there
that get into a rage.

rows.label: tlk43320242_02_msg0005
rows.name:
They will not act as usual,
so fight while staying alert.
